text:
In the first space, I feel a sense of calm and openness. The minimalism and gentle lighting encourage reflection and invite thought, almost as if I am in the waiting room of my own mind, poised between action and contemplation.

Moving into the vibrant R+D exhibit, I am suddenly engaged. The energetic colors and innovative displays spark curiosity; the interplay of research and creativity here feels alive and charged with possibility. I am invigorated by the sense of progress and wonder about the connections being drawn between human and machine. Both spaces invite me to inhabit different modes of thought—one quiet and still, the other dynamic and forward-looking.
